Key strengths mentioned include the cookies' rich flavor, real chocolate chips, and moist texture. The only common complaint is the desire for a larger quantity, with some customers wishing for a "bushel box" to avoid running out too quickly. Some customers also mention that the cookies are fresh and packaged well, with one reviewer noting that they arrived on time and were as fresh as those found in a local grocery store. One reviewer mentions that they were initially skeptical but ended up loving the cookies, citing their depth of flavor and quality ingredients. Another reviewer jokingly mentions that the cookies are "good for you" (although this is likely meant as a humorous comment rather than a serious claim). Overall, the reviews suggest that Famous Amos chocolate chip cookies are a high-quality and delicious treat.
